title: descurainia glabrescens
intro: Descurainia glabrescens, also known as western tansy mustard, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Descurainia glabrescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Descurainia glabrescens is typically harvested in the summer months and can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
